examples.title: Solar Energy Output Calculation
examples.description: Calculate daily solar energy generation based on panel area, efficiency, and solar irradiance
examples.explanation: This algorithm calculates the expected daily electricity output from a solar PV system considering panel area, efficiency, solar irradiance, and system losses.

examples.title: Wind Turbine Power Calculation
examples.description: Calculate power output from wind turbine using Betz limit
examples.explanation: Calculates theoretical and actual power output from wind turbines considering Betz limit and system efficiencies.

examples.title: Biogas Yield Estimation
examples.description: Estimate biogas production based on organic waste input
examples.explanation: Estimates biogas and methane production from organic waste based on waste type and volatile solids content.

examples.title: Renewable Energy System Selection
examples.description: Decision support for selecting appropriate renewable energy system
examples.code:
ALGORITHM EnergySystemSelection
BEGIN
 INPUT: LocationData (annual wind speed, solar irradiance), AvailableArea, Budget, EnergyRequirement
 
 // Calculate potential for each source
 SolarPotential = LocationData.SolarIrradiance * 0.15 * AvailableArea * 0.85
 WindPotential = WindPowerCalc(LocationData.WindSpeed, 50) // assuming 50m rotor
 BiomassPotential = AvailableBiomass * 0.5 // kWh per kg
 
 // Calculate installation costs per kWh
 SolarCostPerWatt = 0.80
 WindCostPerWatt = 1.50
 BiomassCostPerWatt = 1.00
 
 // Check feasibility
 SolarFeasible = (SolarPotential >= EnergyRequirement) AND (Budget >= SolarCostPerWatt * SolarPotential)
 WindFeasible = (WindPotential >= EnergyRequirement) AND (Budget >= WindCostPerWatt * WindPotential)
 BiomassFeasible = (BiomassPotential >= EnergyRequirement) AND (Budget >= BiomassCostPerWatt * BiomassPotential)
 
 // Select best option based on cost-effectiveness
 IF SolarFeasible THEN
 SolarLCOE = (SolarCostPerWatt * SolarPotential) / (SolarPotential * 25 * 365)
 ELSE
 SolarLCOE = Infinity
 END IF
 
 SIMILARLY for Wind and Biomass
 
 // Choose minimum LCOE (Levelized Cost of Energy)
 IF SolarLCOE < WindLCOE AND SolarLCOE < BiomassLCOE THEN
 Recommendation = "Solar PV System"
 ELSE IF WindLCOE < BiomassLCOE THEN
 Recommendation = "Wind Turbine System"
 ELSE
 Recommendation = "Biomass/Biogas System"
 END IF
 
 OUTPUT: Recommendation
END
examples.explanation: A decision support algorithm to select the most appropriate renewable energy system based on location resources, area, budget, and energy needs.
